{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Subspace lock
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Subspace lock]] is a mechanism that [[Nelthan]] orders to be removed.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c37">''The Captain'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Subspace lock]] is a measure used to stop vessels from diving into [[Subspace]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c47">''The Pilot'', chapter 47</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“Remove the Subspace lock,” Nelthan ordered.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
